name: guru-review-change-request
description: Review whether a current change request is one independently deliverable unit through linked prerequisite evidence, an AI readiness gate, and five typed exits.

entry_preconditions.evidence: installed extension manifest, dispatcher, active package inventory and declared record/check runtime commands
entry_preconditions.binding: complete compatible Guru Team preset runtime
entry_preconditions.freshness: validated by run-skill-command before every runtime command

entry_preconditions.evidence: one existing issue, side-effect-free proposed draft, or explicit standalone request with current title/body identity
entry_preconditions.binding: the exact change request reviewed by all prerequisite Skills and the readiness AI gate
entry_preconditions.freshness: target authority and reviewed content are rebuilt from the same change-request input during recording and checking

entry_preconditions.evidence: current guru-context-discovery-1.0 context_ready result or explicit missing/stale facts
entry_preconditions.binding: base, live target, current Docs/code/tests, duplicate facts and archived history
entry_preconditions.freshness: existing objective context structural and live checks are rerun before ready

entry_preconditions.evidence: current guru-requirements-clarification-2.0 clear result or explicit missing/stale facts
entry_preconditions.binding: the same retained open issue/draft target, checker-passed disposition, content and scope decision
entry_preconditions.freshness: existing objective clarification structural and live checks are rerun before ready

entry_preconditions.evidence: current guru-contract-wording-review-1.0 change_request pass result or explicit missing/stale facts
entry_preconditions.binding: the same title/body bytes and fixed change-request scope
entry_preconditions.freshness: the fixed scope is rebuilt and rescanned before ready

entry_preconditions.evidence: mode, target identity, prerequisite projections, linkage digest, AI review, confirmation policy and typed consumer
entry_preconditions.freshness: checker recomputes the complete objective projection from current prerequisite bytes

validators.objective_scope: stdout-only target normalization, existing prerequisite objective checks, fixed linkage projection, closed schema, semantic evidence shape, consumer identity and facts digest
published schema, current target and 2.0 clarification disposition projection, linkage and facts digest recomputation, fixed dimensions/findings references, Gate/exit invariant and exact consumer

external_exits.evidence: all ten AI-reviewed dimensions passed, no blocking finding, and all three prerequisite projections are current and linked
the AI found a user decision gap, delivery-unit conflict, or need for a new reviewed draft
the AI found missing, stale, unchecked, mismatched, or non-pass change-request wording evidence
the AI found stale base, live target, query, current-state, duplicate, or archived-history identity
the target is already complete without an independent gap or the delivery conflict cannot be resolved safely

reentry.identity: mode, target identity/content digests, three prerequisite projections, linkage digest, semantic review, confirmation, typed exit and facts digest
reentry.freshness: ready is accepted only while the same current prerequisite bytes rebuild the exact recorded target and linkage projections; any drift requires complete owner re-entry
